# Reuben Ingber — Personal Blog & Portfolio
> Engineering Manager at Business Insider. Father of two in Queens, NY.
> Writing about parenting, ADHD, engineering management, books, and life.

## About
Reuben Ingber is an Engineering Manager at Business Insider with over 10 years of experience.
He writes about fatherhood, ADHD, productivity systems, books, and the intersection of work and life.
